clips.text: What a strike! Goal!
They find the net! Goal!
Unstoppable! That's a goal!
Ripples the net! Goal!
Put a bow on it! Goal!
That's going on the highlight reel! Goal!
What a save!
Denied at the last second!
Incredible stop!
Keeper comes up huge!
Not today! What a denial!
Demolished!
Taken out of the play!
Absolute demolition!
That car just became modern art!
Send flowers! Demolished!
Here we go!
Let's light it up!
Round starts now!
Engines hot! Let's dance!
Ten!
Nine!
Eight!
Seven!
Six!
Five!
Four!
Three!
Two!
One!
Go!
Ignition!
One minute remaining!
Sixty seconds on the clock!
Final minute! Make it count!
Thirty seconds left!
Half a minute! Push!
Thirty seconds! This is crunch time!
Power shot!
What a rocket!
Cannon fire!
That ball just applied for citizenship in orbit!
Flip reset!
They reset mid-air!
Style points incoming!
What an aerial!
Airborne challenge!
They're writing poetry up there!
Off the post!
Rattles the woodwork!
So close off the bar!
The post says absolutely not!
Oh, so close!
Just wide!
Nearly!
The woodwork says no!
That was a postcard away from glory!
Blue takes the lead!
Blue are ahead!
Blue hit the nitrous!
Orange takes the lead!
Orange are ahead!
Orange just turned up the heat!
Overtime! Next goal wins!
Sudden death! Who wants it more?!
Extra time! Somebody write a legend!
That's the match!
Final whistle! What a game!
Match over!
Book it! What a show!
It's a parking lot out there!
Everybody wants the ball!
Chaos in the box!
Pinball machine activated!
Someone order a traffic cone!
Four bumpers, one ball, zero manners!
Midfield just turned into a mosh pit!
Somebody call a tow truck!
That's one way to take a nap!
Belly up! Flip it!
Gravity wins that round!
Roof inspection complete!
They are reading the ceiling!
Fifty-fifty! Who wants it more?!
Two cars, one ball, zero mercy!
Challenge! Don't blink!
Hard challenge incoming!
Brave souls collide!
This contact will decide the play!
Anybody gonna touch that?
The ball's filing for unemployment!
Free real estate on that ball!
It's lonely in midfield!
That ball is collecting dust!
Someone adopt that ball, please!
That one left a dent in spacetime!
Physics just filed a complaint!
Absolute thunderclap!
Send that one to NASA!
The stadium felt that!
Microphone just peaked!
Wake up out there! The ball isn't coming to you!
Sightseeing tour? Get involved!
They're watching the game like it's TV!
Somebody check if that car still has a driver!
Initiative? Never heard of her!
That's a lot of standing around for a car soccer match!
The ball is over THERE! Hint hint!
Passive mode engaged. Not a compliment!
Did they park? Because nothing is happening!
Hello? Controllers still plugged in?
They're buffering while the match loads!
Statue mode. Very avant-garde. Very useless!
They're everywhere! Absolute menace!
Main character energy! Owning the pitch!
This player is cooking with gas!
Relentless! They want every ball!
That car just filed for overtime!
Initiative through the roof!
They're writing the script tonight!
Hungry! Starving! Devouring plays!
Beautiful touch! That's how you do it!
Clean play! Textbook!
They make it look easy!
Chef's kiss on that contact!
That's the stuff highlight reels dream of!
Composure! Class! Control!
They just earned a standing ovation!
Ice cold under pressure!
Oof! That was a swing and a miss!
They whiffed harder than a summer breeze!
GPS says the ball was over there!
That touch needs a refund!
Somebody hide the replay!
Bold strategy. Terrible results!
The ball said no thank you!
That's going on the blooper reel!
My grandmother would have hit that!
They just invented a new way to miss!
Close! By the standards of another sport!
That was a donation to the other team!
Skill issue detected! Loudly!
They whiffed so hard the ball felt awkward!
Yikes! That one stung the ego!
Look at that hustle! Closing the gap!
They're flying across the pitch!
Recovery run! Pure work rate!
Boots to the metal! Love to see it!
That chase is personal!
They refuse to give up the play!
Great view from the cheap seats!
They're taking notes instead of touches!
Camera operator energy from that car!
The action is happening without them!
Someone page the driver!
Participation trophy still available!
They're spectating their own match!
Front row seats, zero involvement!
Is that car AFK? Asking for a friend!
Blue looking sharp! Clockwork!
Blue are clicking tonight!
That's Blue chemistry right there!
Blue mean business!
Blue with the clinic!
Paint it blue! They own this stretch!
Orange on fire! Keep that heat!
Orange are cooking!
That's Orange swagger!
Orange with the answer!
Orange turning up the thermostat!
Sunset squad looking lethal!
Blue, that was amateur hour!
Blue just gifted the ball!
Wake up, Blue! Sleepwalking!
Blue defending with a welcome mat!
Blue, my grandmother hits harder!
Blue looking lost in their own half!
Blue, that turnover was criminal!
Blue are playing hot potato with the ball!
Blue defense just opened a gift shop!
Somebody reboot Blue's firmware!
Blue, that was soft. Marshmallow soft!
Orange, that was a soft serve!
Orange just mailed it in!
Come on, Orange! Tighten up!
Orange defending like it's optional!
Orange, the ball is not a hot potato!
Orange looking allergic to the ball!
Orange, that giveaway was generous!
Orange just donated possession!
Orange defense went on vacation!
Wake up call for Orange! Anyone home?
Orange, that was butter fingers on wheels!
The scoreboard is doing the talking!
One team is writing a statement!
This is turning into a clinic!
The gap is getting rude!
Somebody call a comeback, quick!
Blowout vibes creeping in!
This scoreline is getting personal!
Mercy rule whispering in the hallway!
The underdogs need a miracle and a snack!
Hold up — is that a loot crate falling from the sky?
Ladies and gentlemen, we have a drop!
Something shiny just crash-landed on the pitch!
Post-match present incoming! Don't blink!
Lady Luck just mailed us a mystery box!
Is it a car? Is it wheels? It's a mystery box!
Someone call security — a crate just trespassed!
Loot drop! The crowd goes mildly unhinged!
That's not a rebound — that's a present!
Special delivery from the rocket gods! Sign here for chaos!
Box from the heavens! Popcorn ready!
Oh no. Oh yes. A crate!
The algorithm felt generous today!
Treasure chest vibes on the pitch!
Don't open it with your bumper. Or do!
A wild crate appears!
Post-game care package! Contents: classified!
That thud was either a goal post or free cosmetics!
Free loot? In this economy? Let's go!
The sky is raining boxes and I am here for it!
It's raining crates and loot!
Somebody ordered chaos and it arrived in a crate!
If this is empty I'm filing a complaint with the universe!
The suspense is thicker than boost smoke!
Please be wheels. Please be wheels. Okay I'll take anything!
That box is vibrating with bad decisions!
I can smell the rarity from here. Or maybe that's the tires.
Open it slow. Or smash it. I'm not your boss!
It's giving main-character energy in cardboard form!
Bonus round unlocked: stare at a box!
My grandma collects stamps. We collect falling crates!
Congratulations, you played yourself into free stuff!
Is this legal? Asking for a friend with a garage!
The crate landed harder than my last aerial!
Plot twist: the real match was the loot we found along the way!
Don't mind me, I'm emotionally attached to this box already!
Shake it! If it rattles, it's either wheels or disappointment!
Crate check! Ego check! Let's get weird!
This is the part where we all pretend we deserved it!
I would trade my boost for a peek inside!
And the crowd whispers: ooh, shiny!
Hmm hmm hmm... look what floated down!
Doo doo doo doo — surprise in a box!
La la laa — crate song, everybody!
Bum bum buuum — loot o'clock!
Naa naa naa, naa naa naa — open the crate!
I'm humming the jackpot tune, don't judge me!
Doobie doo — something rare this way comes!
Hmm-mm, that thud had melody!
Laa-dee-daa, free cosmetics falling from heaven!
Doo-wop doo-wop — crate drop harmony!
The bomb has been planted! Wait — wrong game. It's a crate!
Case opening energy! Somebody call the trade-up gods!
Field-tested? Minimal wear? This crate looks factory new!
Don't overpay for stickers — just open the box!
One-tap the lid! Crisp as a dusty mid headshot!
More tension than overtime on Dust Two!
Unbox protocol initiated! Gloves optional, vibes mandatory!
Skin market who? We rain free cosmetics now!
Hotter than a crimson web and twice as suspicious!
Call mid! Call B! Call the crate!
This drop has Eco-round desperation and full-buy swagger!
Clutch crate! Save it for the highlight reel!
Ace energy in cardboard form — open it!
That's not a decoy — that's premium loot!
Flashbang the suspense! I'm peeking the box!
It's dangerous to go alone — take this crate!
It's-a me! Mystery box!
Hey you. You're finally awake. Here's a crate.
Hmm. A crate. Interesting.
The cake is a crate!
These aren't the crates you're looking for. Oh wait — they are!
One crate to rule them all!
There is no crate... there is a crate!
It belongs in a museum! Or your garage!
Mission passed! Respect plus bonus crate!
Ping the loot! Apex instincts kicking in!
Engram vibes — but make it a crate!
Victory Royale energy, but the prize is a box!
Diamond pickaxe energy in cardboard packaging!
Sus crate. Definitely not the impostor. Probably.
High noon for loot! Draw on that lid!
Press F to pay respects to your empty inventory!
This is the way. The crate way.
I am inevitable... and so is this drop!
Winter is coming — and so is free cosmetics!
May the loot be with you!
To infinity... and the inventory!
Say hello to my little crate!
I'll be back — after I open this!
Houston, we have a drop!
Life finds a way... into your loadout!
Why so serious? It's just free stuff!
You shall not pass... unless you open the crate!
My preciousss... crate!
Bond. James Bond. And this is my crate.
Wakanda has garages too — open it!
Avengers assemble... around the box!
This is fine. Everything is fine. Beautiful crate.
Big brain play: receive free loot after the match!
Touch grass? Nah. Touch crate!
Sheeeesh — look at that drop!
No cap, this crate is fire!
Absolute cinema. Absolute crate.
We got a situation — a shiny situation!
Boss music just started for a cardboard box!
Final boss of restraint: don't smash-open yet!
Speedrun any percent: open the crate!
New side quest unlocked: stare at loot!
Achievement unlocked: emotionally invested in cardboard!
Loading screen tip: crates contain vibes and maybe wheels!
Patch notes: added one extremely juicy box!
Server lag? No — just your heart before the open!
That thud had more aura than the whole highlight reel!
Knowing my luck this dropped a blue knife... wait, wrong game!
Please be a knife skin! Oh right — this is car soccer.
Somewhere a Counter-Strike player just felt a disturbance in the knife market!
If this were a weapon case I'd already be checking the float!
Butterfly knife dreams die here — welcome to wheels!
Karambit? No. Car-ambit. Get in the garage!
StatTrak for boost pads? Honestly I'd buy that.
Relax — it's not another battle-scarred rifle. It's a crate!
Trade up for a knife? Nah. Trade up for a paint job!
Gold knife energy... applied to cardboard. Still valid!
Doppler fade? Sorry buddy — this crate fades into cosmetics!
Don't sell your knife yet — this drop might be wheels instead!
Case hardened heart, factory-new hopes, car-soccer reality!
I opened for a knife and got... emotional damage and a box!
Talon knife who? Talon wheels when?
That shimmer looks like a gamma Doppler... of disappointment!
Market listing: rare crate, low float, zero knives, all vibes!
Unboxed a dream — packed a car part. Classic!
